verse_text: Also one young male of the goats as a sin offering to the Lord shall be offered, in addition to the regular whole burnt offering with its drink offering.

links.context: to (2) the weekly offerings ([[EXO.20:8]]-11; Lv 23:3; [[NUM.28:9]], [[NUM.28:10]]), to (3) the monthly offerings ([[NUM.28:11]]-15), to (4) the yearly offerings ([[EXO.12:1]]-20; 23:15, 16;

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
